backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Article, UserProfile, and NewsletterSubscription types with CRUD operations, access control via MixinAuthorization, and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (public frontend rebuild, footer preservation, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Inside Pet Tech React app, mounting the app at the root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with separate public (Navbar/Footer) and admin route trees, wrapped in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/articles/Article: Reusable article card component supporting default, compact, and featured variants with crimson branding, Playfair Display headings, and TanStack Router links to article and category pages.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog component that prompts new users to set up their admin profile by entering a name and optional bio, then saves it via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer component with a newsletter subscription form, category navigation links, and brand information for Inside Pet Tech.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Sticky top navigation bar with the site logo, desktop category links, and a collapsible mobile menu for Inside Pet Tech.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: A standalone newsletter signup section component with an email input form that subscribes users via the useSubscribeToNewsletter mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token when authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, covering admin checks, user profile management, and article CRUD operations (public and admin) against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes plus utility classes for brand gradients and editorial styling.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting helper functions for class merging, date formatting, slug generation, ID generation, and label/slug mapping for Category, ContentType, and ArticleStatus enums.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page describing Inside Pet Tech's mission, editorial pillars (six content categories), and four target audience segments with a hero section and structured layout.
Admin dashboard page that lists all articles in a tabbed table with stats cards, and provides publish, archive, and delete actions with confirmation dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLayout.tsx: Layout wrapper for admin routes that handles Internet Identity authentication, admin role verification, initial admin claiming with polling, connection timeout detection, and renders a profile setup modal when needed.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ArticleEditor.t: Form page for creating or editing articles, supporting fields like title, slug (auto-generated), category, content type, and featured flag, with validation and create/update mutations.
frontend/src/pages/ArticleDetailPage.tsx: Article detail page that fetches and displays a single article by ID including its thumbnail, metadata, and body, plus a related articles section filtered by category.
frontend/src/pages/CategoryPage.tsx: Category listing page that resolves a URL slug to a Category enum, fetches matching articles, and renders them in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with editorial and advertising email info cards alongside a controlled form that simulates submission and shows a success state upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the public home page with a hero article, latest news grid, and category sections (Trends, Podcasts, News & Views, Startups) using React Query hooks to fetch and display articles with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color palettes (crimson, indigo, slate, semantic tokens), editorial box shadows, border radii, and typography plugin settings. Enables dark mode via class and includes the typography and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 31) describing 'Inside Pet Tech', a Retail Dive-style pet tech news site, including its architectural notes, known issues (navigation bugs, admin access failures, deployment regressions), and a list of existing implemented features.
